tiles.title: Fraud Watch List -- High Risk Claims

queries.text:
union
  (claims_events | where event_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize claims = count()),
  (adt_events | where event_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize adt = count()),
  (rx_events | where event_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize rx = count()),
  (fraud_scores | where score_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize fraud = count()),
  (care_gap_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize gaps = count()),
  (highcost_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize highcost = count())
| summarize
    claims_5m = sum(claims),
    adt_events_5m = sum(adt),
    rx_events_5m = sum(rx),
    fraud_alerts_5m = sum(fraud),
    care_gap_alerts_5m = sum(gaps),
    highcost_alerts_5m = sum(highcost)

union
  (claims_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'claims' | project event_timestamp, table_name),
  (adt_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'adt' | project event_timestamp, table_name),
  (rx_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'rx' | project event_timestamp, table_name)
| summarize
    claims = countif(table_name == 'claims'),
    adt_events = countif(table_name == 'adt'),
    rx_events = countif(table_name == 'rx')
    by time_bucket = bin(event_timestamp, 5m)
| order by time_bucket asc

union
  (claims_events | where event_timestamp > ago(1h) | project event_type),
  (adt_events | where event_timestamp > ago(1h) | project event_type),
  (rx_events | where event_timestamp > ago(1h) | project event_type)
| summarize event_count = count() by event_type
| order by event_count desc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize claim_count = count() by risk_tier
| order by case(
    risk_tier == 'critical', 1,
    risk_tier == 'high', 2,
    risk_tier == 'medium', 3,
    4) asc

union
  (fraud_scores | where score_timestamp > ago(24h) | extend alert_type = 'fraud' | project ts = score_timestamp, alert_type),
  (care_gap_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(24h) | extend alert_type = 'care_gap' | project ts = alert_timestamp, alert_type),
  (highcost_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(24h) | extend alert_type = 'highcost' | project ts = alert_timestamp, alert_type)
| summarize
    fraud_alerts = countif(alert_type == 'fraud'),
    care_gap_alerts = countif(alert_type == 'care_gap'),
    highcost_alerts = countif(alert_type == 'highcost')
    by hour_bucket = bin(ts, 1h)
| order by hour_bucket asc

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    total_alerts = count(),
    unique_patients = dcount(patient_id),
    unique_measures = dcount(measure_id),
    critical_alerts = countif(alert_priority == 'critical'),
    high_alerts = countif(alert_priority == 'high'),
    avg_days_overdue = round(avg(gap_days_overdue), 0),
    max_days_overdue = max(gap_days_overdue)

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize alert_count = count() by measure_name
| order by alert_count desc
| take 15

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize alert_count = count() by alert_priority
| order by case(
    alert_priority == 'critical', 1,
    alert_priority == 'high', 2,
    alert_priority == 'medium', 3,
    4) asc

care_gap_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| project
    alert_timestamp,
    patient_id,
    facility_name,
    measure_name,
    gap_days_overdue,
    alert_priority,
    alert_text
| order by gap_days_overdue desc
| take 50

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize patient_count = dcount(patient_id) by risk_tier
| order by case(
    risk_tier == 'critical', 1,
    risk_tier == 'high', 2,
    risk_tier == 'medium', 3,
    4) asc

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize patient_count = dcount(patient_id) by cost_trend
| order by patient_count desc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    total_scored = count(),
    high_risk_claims = countif(risk_tier in ('high', 'critical')),
    critical_claims = countif(risk_tier == 'critical'),
    avg_fraud_score = round(avg(fraud_score), 3),
    max_fraud_score = round(max(fraud_score), 3),
    total_claim_amount = round(sum(claim_amount), 2),
    high_risk_amount = round(sumif(claim_amount, risk_tier in ('high', 'critical')), 2)

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize
    avg_fraud_score = round(avg(fraud_score), 3),
    total_claims = count(),
    high_risk = countif(risk_tier in ('high', 'critical'))
    by hour_bucket = bin(score_timestamp, 1h)
| extend high_risk_pct = round(todouble(high_risk) / todouble(total_claims) * 100, 1)
| order by hour_bucket asc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp > ago(24h)
| join kind=inner (claims_events | project claim_id, event_type) on $left.claim_id == $right.claim_id
| summarize avg_fraud_score = round(avg(fraud_score), 3), claim_count = count() by event_type
| order by avg_fraud_score desc

fraud_scores
| where score_timestamp > ago(24h)
| where risk_tier in ('high', 'critical')
| project
    score_timestamp,
    claim_id,
    patient_id,
    provider_id,
    claim_amount,
    fraud_score,
    fraud_flags,
    risk_tier
| order by fraud_score desc
| take 50

highcost_alerts
| where alert_timestamp > ago(24h)
| where risk_tier in ('high', 'critical')
| project
    alert_timestamp,
    patient_id,
    rolling_spend_30d,
    rolling_spend_90d,
    ed_visits_30d,
    readmission_flag,
    risk_tier,
    cost_trend
| order by rolling_spend_90d desc
| take 50

union
  (claims_events | summarize last_event = max(event_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'claims_events'),
  (adt_events | summarize last_event = max(event_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'adt_events'),
  (rx_events | summarize last_event = max(event_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'rx_events'),
  (fraud_scores | summarize last_event = max(score_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'fraud_scores'),
  (care_gap_alerts | summarize last_event = max(alert_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'care_gap_alerts'),
  (highcost_alerts | summarize last_event = max(alert_timestamp), row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'highcost_alerts')
| extend minutes_ago = round(datetime_diff('minute', now(), last_event), 0)
| project table_name, row_count, last_event, minutes_ago
| order by table_name asc

union
  (claims_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'claims_events' | project ts = event_timestamp, table_name),
  (adt_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'adt_events' | project ts = event_timestamp, table_name),
  (rx_events | where event_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'rx_events' | project ts = event_timestamp, table_name),
  (fraud_scores | where score_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'fraud_scores' | project ts = score_timestamp, table_name),
  (care_gap_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'care_gap_alerts' | project ts = alert_timestamp, table_name),
  (highcost_alerts | where alert_timestamp > ago(6h) | extend table_name = 'highcost_alerts' | project ts = alert_timestamp, table_name)
| summarize
    claims_events = countif(table_name == 'claims_events'),
    adt_events = countif(table_name == 'adt_events'),
    rx_events = countif(table_name == 'rx_events'),
    fraud_scores = countif(table_name == 'fraud_scores'),
    care_gap_alerts = countif(table_name == 'care_gap_alerts'),
    highcost_alerts = countif(table_name == 'highcost_alerts')
    by time_bucket = bin(ts, 5m)
| order by time_bucket asc

union
  (claims_events | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'claims_events'),
  (adt_events | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'adt_events'),
  (rx_events | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'rx_events'),
  (fraud_scores | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'fraud_scores'),
  (care_gap_alerts | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'care_gap_alerts'),
  (highcost_alerts | summarize row_count = count() | extend table_name = 'highcost_alerts')
| order by row_count desc

adt_events
| where event_timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize event_count = count() by facility_name
| order by event_count desc
| take 15
